title: Operating Manual for Spaceship Earth
author: R. Buckminster Fuller
hook: The book that reframes AI strategy as a question of comprehensive thinking — and exposes the cost of specialization before you ever open a chatbot.

title: Steve Jobs
author: Walter Isaacson
hook: The biography that reveals what happens when someone refuses to separate design thinking from engineering — and what AI teams can learn from that obsession.

title: This Is for Everyone: The Unfinished Story of the World Wide Web
author: Tim Berners-Lee
hook: The inventor of the web tells the story of sharing a world-changing technology for free — and why that decision matters more than ever in the age of AI.

title: Being You: A New Science of Consciousness
author: Anil Seth
hook: Before you can understand artificial intelligence you need to understand the real thing — Seth rewrites what we think consciousness actually is.

title: Clean Agile: Back to Basics
author: Robert C. Martin
hook: The Agile Manifesto co-author strips away two decades of corporate bloat and gets back to what iterative development actually means — essential for AI project teams.

title: Shared Wisdom: Cultural Evolution in the Age of AI
author: Alex Pentland
hook: MIT's data science pioneer argues that AI should amplify collective human wisdom rather than replace it — the book the industry needs right now.
